title: Add Agent Card discovery protocol (A2A-inspired)
source: Google A2A protocol v0.3 — Agent Cards for capability discovery
description: Replace hardcoded AGENT_PROMPTS and auto_select_agent() with JSON agent cards declaring capabilities, input/output schemas, and constraints. Makes agent selection dynamic and extensible.
proposed_changes: Create agents/ directory with JSON agent cards. Replace AGENT_PROMPTS/AGENT_MODELS with load_agent_card(). Replace auto_select_agent() with match_agent_cards() scoring against card capabilities. Replace TEAM_TEMPLATES with template files referencing cards.
